paywall.cta.openStudyHub: Open your study hub
paywall.ctaDecisionLine: If this preview matches how you want to prepare, the next step is straightforward: compare plans when you are ready. Pricing lays out each t
paywall.objections.afterPay.a: You pay securely in Stripe; when payment succeeds, your tier activates on our servers within seconds. Back in NurseNest, preview caps clear
paywall.objections.different.q: What makes this different?
paywall.objections.ifStayFree.a: You stay under the cap: limited reps before practice stops, weaker readiness than unlimited blocks with full rationale depth, and no persist
paywall.objections.otherPrep.q: Is this better than UWorld or Archer?
paywall.objections.passExam.a: Your study hours earn the pass—NurseNest makes each hour higher-yield: exam-style prioritization, option-level rationales on every choice, a
paywall.objections.passExam.q: Will this actually help me pass?
paywall.objections.proofNeutral: Same build subscribers get: exam-style stem, four choices, full teach-through on every option. Subscription unlocks the full pathway bank an
paywall.objections.proofNoCount: Same build quality as paid items: exam-style stem, four choices, full teach-through on correct and incorrect options. Subscription unlocks t
paywall.objections.proofWithCount: Same build quality as paid items: exam-style stem, four choices, full teach-through on correct and incorrect options. The pathway bank lists
paywall.objections.upToDate.q: Is this up to date?
paywall.objections.worthIt.q: Is this worth it?
paywall.passPromise.heading: Will this help me pass?
paywall.passPromise.lead: You earn the pass—NurseNest trains what regulators test: prioritization, safety, and scope under time. Items include full teaching rationale
paywall.preCta.microLine1: You’re building exam judgment on purpose—not guessing your way through the bank.
paywall.preCta.microLine2: Stripe shows price, tax if applicable, and renewal before you pay; subscription terms and refund rules are linked from Pricing and checkout.
paywall.preview.contentFreshness: No bait-and-switch: this block uses the same stem, choices, and rationale pattern as the public homepage sample. A paid plan unlocks the ful
paywall.preview.heading: Same item you previewed on the homepage—now in your practice flow
paywall.preview.lessonsLine: {{count}}+ pathway lessons
paywall.preview.neutralProofBody: We couldn’t load live counts just now—your connection or our servers may be busy. Premium still unlocks the full pathway-scoped bank, lesson
paywall.preview.proofIntro: What’s in the library right now
paywall.preview.qualitativeProofBody: Counts vary by pathway and how often we publish. Premium gives you the full scoped question bank, complete lessons, and teaching rationales
paywall.preview.rationaleDepthHint: Every teaching rationale states the correct action with pathophysiology, then dismantles distractors in priority order—same depth as this sa

paywall.safeToTryLine: Safe to try first: previews and caps are there so you can judge item quality and rationales before any paid plan.

components.homeBottomSections.readinessExamBody: Twenty-five items with an instant breakdown: see whether timing, knowledge, or judgement slipped before you sit for real.
components.homeBottomSections.reportCardBody: Category accuracy and trends over time—so you stop re-drilling chapters you already own and focus where score variance is highest.
components.homeConversionSections.competitiveCta: Compare plans & pricing
components.homeConversionSections.competitiveRow2.ours: Dedicated RPN, RN, NP, and allied tracks with correct scope language
components.homeConversionSections.competitiveRow4.ours: RT, lab, paramedic, imaging, and related tracks with protocol-level framing
components.homeConversionSections.competitiveRow5.feature: Readiness analytics
components.homeConversionSections.competitiveRow5.ours: Category accuracy and session trends that suggest what to queue next
components.homeConversionSections.competitiveRow5.typical: Score-only dashboards with no line-of-sight to the next study block
components.homeConversionSections.conversionProofCta: Create a free account — explore the bank
components.homeConversionSections.conversionProofHeading: What you actually get in the shell
components.homeConversionSections.featureCard.flashcards.desc: Learn and test modes with spaced scheduling so weak concepts resurface before you forget them.
components.homeConversionSections.featureCard.mocks.desc: Full-length timed sessions with breakdowns that show whether timing, knowledge, or judgement slipped.
components.homeConversionSections.featureCard.questions.desc: {{count}} items across domains with detailed rationales focused on judgement—not trivia recall.
components.homeConversionSections.finalCtaHeading: Start rehearsing with your pathway unlocked
components.homeConversionSections.finalCtaSecondary: View pricing
components.homeConversionSections.howStep1.desc: Short lessons and reviews organized by system and competency so you know why a presentation matters—not just the buzzword.
components.homeConversionSections.howStep1.title: Learn the mechanism
components.homeConversionSections.howStep2.desc: Timed and untimed sets, SATA, and case-style stems with rationales that dismantle every option—not just the letter the key lists.
components.homeConversionSections.howStep2.title: Pressure-test with items
components.homeConversionSections.howStep3.desc: See accuracy by domain, carry results into the next session, and stop guessing what to open after a 12-hour shift.
components.homeConversionSections.proofCard.catExams.desc: Timed blocks that adapt difficulty so you are not only rehearsing questions you already own.

components.homeConversionSections.proofCard.examQuestions.desc: Stems written for delegation, prioritization, and pharmacology judgement—with rationales that explain why each distractor fails clinically.
components.homeConversionSections.proofCard.flashcards.desc: Pharmacology, pathophysiology, and high-yield concepts in decks meant for spaced retrieval—not isolated memorization.
components.homeConversionSections.proofCard.lessons.desc: Body-system and competency lessons with quick checks so you know whether the concept stuck before you burn another question block.
components.homeConversionSections.proofCard.lessons.title: Lessons with pre/post checks
components.homeConversionSections.proofCard.multiDiscipline.title: Separate tracks for separate scopes
components.homeConversionSections.sampleQuestionSubcopy: Tap an option, then read how the rationale rules out each distractor—same flow as inside the bank.
components.homeConversionSections.testimonialsSubcopy: Quotes from students preparing for Canadian and US licensure and certification exams—your results depend on how consistently you train.
components.homeConversionSections.trustCountersHeading: Built for high-stakes healthcare exams—not generic multiple-choice drills
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.adaptiveMockExams.nursenest: Timed blocks sized for your filtered pool with performance carryover into review queues
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.adaptiveMockExams.typical: Static PDF-style tests that do not feed the next study block
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.clinicalJudgmentTraining.nursenest: NGN-style cases, bowties, and prioritization drills with full option rationale
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.clinicalJudgmentTraining.typical: Straight multiple choice without the multi-step reasoning stems boards now use
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.clinicalLessons.nursenest: Lessons wired to categories you miss, with pre/post checks instead of passive video only
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.clinicalLessons.typical: No lesson layer or generic slides detached from your item history
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.defaultHeadline: Where NurseNest diverges from generic Qbanks
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.flashcardsIncluded.nursenest: Decks generated from weak tags with spaced scheduling inside the same subscription
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.flashcardsIncluded.typical: Often a separate purchase or static decks disconnected from your miss list
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.multiDisciplineCoverage.nursenest: Dedicated RPN/LVN, RN, NP, and allied tracks with scope-appropriate language
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.readinessAnalytics.nursenest: Domain and competency views that suggest what to queue next
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.readinessAnalytics.typical: Score-only dashboards without a path back to the next session
components.homeDifferentiation.comparison.studyPlanGenerator.typical: One-size schedules that ignore whether pharmacology or prioritization is actually sliding
components.homeDifferentiation.defaultHeadline.np: NP prep that keeps case complexity high without losing the rationale loop
components.homeDifferentiation.defaultSubtitle: NurseNest is built for the judgement calls licensing exams measure: unsafe options, delegation limits, and the pathophysiology behind a symp
components.homeDifferentiation.grid.adaptiveDifficulty.title: Difficulty that tracks your miss patterns

components.homeDifferentiation.grid.clinicalReasoning.description: Each stem explains why the correct choice is safest and why the distractors fail—so you rehearse the same elimination logic the boards rewar
components.homeDifferentiation.grid.clinicalReasoning.title: Rationales that defend every option
components.homeDifferentiation.grid.integratedStudy.description: Jump from a flagged topic into a lesson, then back into a timed block without exporting CSVs or juggling three subscriptions.

components.homeDifferentiation.grid.multiDiscipline.description: PN, RN, NP, and allied banks use the right delegation language and risk framing for that registration—not recycled stem banks with a new lab

components.homeDifferentiation.grid.readinessAnalytics.description: See where accuracy wobbles by system or competency, then queue the next session against that bucket instead of guessing what to open tonight
components.homeDifferentiation.grid.spacedRepetition.description: Cards resurface weak concepts on a schedule so pharmacology and labs stick without a separate deck app.
